hero.primary: I write software to understand how things work.
hero.secondary: Rust, simulations, self-hosted infrastructure. Currently building production systems at NAV IT.

primary.name: Deadreckon
primary.purpose: Deterministic guidance and interception simulation under imperfect state information.
capabilities: Monte Carlo scenario analysis with configurable sweeps
primary.scope: Rust workspace: sim_core, sim_cli, and sim_viz with real-time visualization
primary.evidence: Evaluated across 6 engagement scenarios with configurable noise profiles

primary.name: Foundry
primary.purpose: Self-hosted CI/CD platform replacing GitHub Actions with full deployment automation.
capabilities: GitHub webhook integration with automatic builds and PR checks
Docker container execution with workspace isolation
Automatic domain routing via Cloudflare Tunnels
Scheduled builds, secrets injection, and self-deployment
primary.scope: Rust backend with PostgreSQL, React/TypeScript dashboard
primary.evidence: Deploys itself and 6+ services to a sovereign Mac Mini M4 server

foundational.name: Propagator
foundational.purpose: State propagation library for physical systems with composable force models and numerical integration.
foundational.scope: Rust library designed as simulation substrate
foundational.evidence: Modular architecture supporting downstream simulation projects

foundational.name: N-Body Simulator
foundational.purpose: Numerical experiment exploring integration accuracy and long-term stability in gravitational systems.
foundational.evidence: Numerical behavior observed over extended simulation runs

foundational.name: Neural-Nets
foundational.purpose: From-scratch exploration of neural networks as numerical approximation systems.
foundational.evidence: Training behavior observed through loss convergence

foundational.name: Oxidize
foundational.purpose: Real-time voxel engine used as a performance and data-structure experimentation platform.
foundational.evidence: Performance characteristics explored under varying world sizes

infrastructure.summary: All personal services run on a Mac Mini M4, deployed through Foundry, and exposed via Cloudflare Tunnels.

work.description: Production systems with strict requirements for correctness, accessibility, and long-term maintainability in a regulated environment.
Short-term placements in data analysis, cloud infrastructure, and internal tooling.
Taught programming fundamentals to children aged 8–12 through hands-on projects and visual coding environments.
